executives.name: Alberto Calderon
executives.background: Alberto Calderon was appointed CEO of AngloGold Ashanti in September 2021. He was previously CEO of Orica and has held senior executive roles at BHP, including Group Executive and Chief Commercial Officer.

executives.name: Gaudenz Sturzenegger
executives.background: Gaudenz Sturzenegger joined Lynas in 2011 and was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2018. He has extensive experience in financial management, corporate finance, and accounting within the resources sector.

executives.name: John Beevers
executives.background: John Beevers was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 May 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the resources and chemical industries, including as CEO of Orica Mining Services.
